results.name: 9400-ACCTFILE-CLOSE, 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.preamble:
File: CBSTM03A.CBL
Program: CBSTM03A
Paragraph: 9400-ACCTFILE-CLOSE, 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM (lines 905-924)
References: COPY COSTM01, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CUSTREC, COPY CVACT01Y
Calls: CALL CBSTM03B, CALL CEE3ABD, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9400-ACCTFILE-CLOSE, 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM in CBSTM03A.CBL. uses COPY refs: COSTM01, CVACT03Y, CUSTREC, CVACT01Y. invokes: CALL CBSTM03B, CALL CEE3ABD, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9400-ACCTFILE-CLOSE.
           MOVE 'ACCTFILE' TO WS-M03B-DD.
           SET M03B-CLOSE TO TRUE.
           MOVE ZERO TO WS-M03B-RC.
           CALL 'CBSTM03B' USING WS-M03B-AREA.

           IF WS-M03B-RC = '00' OR '04'
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING ACCTFILE'
               DISPLAY 'RETURN CODE: ' WS-M03B-RC
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF.

           EXIT.

       9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.
           DISPLAY 'ABENDING PROGRAM'
           CALL 'CEE3ABD'.

results.name: ABEND-ROUTINE
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: ABEND-ROUTINE (lines 1531-1553)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph ABEND-ROUTINE in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
ABEND-ROUTINE.                                                           
                                                                                
           IF ABEND-MSG EQUAL LOW-VALUES                                        
              MOVE 'UNEXPECTED ABEND OCCURRED.' TO ABEND-MSG                    
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           MOVE LIT-THISPGM       TO ABEND-CULPRIT                              
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS SEND                                                       
                            FROM (ABEND-DATA)                                   
                            LENGTH(LENGTH OF ABEND-DATA)                        
                            NOHANDLE                                            
                            ERASE                                               
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS HANDLE ABEND                                               
                CANCEL                                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS ABEND                                                      
                ABCODE('9999')                                                  
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .

results.name: ABEND-ROUTINE
results.preamble:
File: COACTUPC.cbl
Program: COACTUPC - Business logic - Accept and process ACCOUNT UPDATE
Paragraph: ABEND-ROUTINE (lines 4203-4225)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY CSLKPCDY, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CSSETATY, COPY CSUTLDPY
results.summary: paragraph ABEND-ROUTINE in COACTUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, CSLKPCDY, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
ABEND-ROUTINE.

           IF ABEND-MSG EQUAL LOW-VALUES
              MOVE 'UNEXPECTED ABEND OCCURRED.' TO ABEND-MSG
           END-IF

           MOVE LIT-THISPGM       TO ABEND-CULPRIT

           EXEC CICS SEND
                            FROM (ABEND-DATA)
                            LENGTH(LENGTH OF ABEND-DATA)
                            NOHANDLE
                            ERASE
           END-EXEC

           EXEC CICS HANDLE ABEND
                CANCEL
           END-EXEC

           EXEC CICS ABEND
                ABCODE('9999')
           END-EXEC
           .

results.name: 9300-CARDFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN01C.cbl
Program: CBTRN01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 9300-CARDFILE-CLOSE (lines 415-432)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 9300-CARDFILE-CLOSE in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9300-CARDFILE-CLOSE.
           ADD 8 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT.
           CLOSE CARD-FILE
           IF  CARDFILE-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING CARD FILE'
               MOVE CARDFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
